title: Leek Fold Light Breeze
description: A floral and light Turkish dish featuring leeks in a delicate fold, perfect for brunch with low-carb options.

ingredients.name: 3 medium leeks
ingredients.notes: reserve some slices whole for garnish

instructions: Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add diced onion, cook until translucent.
Add leeks and garlic to the skillet; cook for about 7-10 minutes until softened.
Stir in lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Fold the leek mixture into the thickened cream with reserved sliced leeks. Stir gently but thoroughly to combine.
Pour into a baking dish lined with parchment paper. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
Serve warm with fresh herbs for garnish.
